title: Hyperliquid $HYPE Flips Solana in Market Cap
excerpt: New Fed Chair Kevin Warsh prepares rate decisions as inflation hits 3-year high of 4.2%; markets brace for potential hikes. Impacts bond yields, equities, and recession signals for macro investors.

title: DeFi's Revenue-Sharing Revolution: AERO and HYPE Are Printing Real Yield
excerpt: Aerodrome Finance distributes 100% of trading fees to locked holders. Hyperliquid buys back supply daily. DeFi has graduated from promises to real cash flows.

title: Anthropic Files for IPO at $965 Billion — Beating OpenAI to the SEC
excerpt: The first frontier AI lab to file a confidential S-1. Alongside a $36B chip deal, the AI industry's financial architecture is being rewritten.

title: When AI Agents Control Your Wallet: The End of Personal Finance Management
excerpt: AI agents + programmable money will make human-managed personal finance obsolete. Here's what that world looks like.

title: The Death of Correspondent Banking: How AI + Stablecoins Replace SWIFT
excerpt: SWIFT takes 5 days and costs $50. Stablecoins take 5 seconds for $0.001. The math has already decided the winner.

title: The Fight for Intelligence Infrastructure: Who Controls AI Will Control the Future Economy
excerpt: Raoul Pal's one question: Is the world more digital in the future? The answer determines everything about AI, crypto, and wealth.
